theme_strategy.description: Elite athleticism, precision, command-center focus. Tactical minimalism.

left_panel.style: border-r border-border bg-card/50 p-4 flex flex-col gap-4

buttons.default: rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

inputs.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

universal_guidelines: Use solid colors over gradients for backgrounds to maintain a 'tactical' look.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all data values (IPs, Phone Numbers, Timestamps).
Interactive elements must have hover and focus states.
Use generous padding (p-4, p-6) inside cards to avoid clutter.
Scrollbars should be thin and customized to match the dark theme.
No 'AI slop' - keep designs sharp, purposeful, and aligned.
For the map visualization, use a dark mode map style (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter) if using a library, or a stylized SVG map.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the 3-panel layout in App.js using the defined layout structure.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Customize tailwind.config.js with the provided color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Dashboard' component that orchestrates the Upload, Analysis, and Chat modules.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Use 'recharts' for data visualization (BarChart, LineChart) in the Center Panel.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Chatbot UI in the Right Panel using a scrollable message area and a fixed input area.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure responsive design: Stack panels on mobile (Left -> Center -> Right).
